title: MT HOOD COMMUNITY COLLEGE - 211info
text: MT HOOD COMMUNITY COLLEGE MT HOOD COMMUNITY COLLEGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of educational, vocational, college credit, and developmental courses, including adult basic education, GED test instruction, continuing education opportunities, and ESL classes. 26000 SE Stark Street Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Class times vary (503) 491-6422 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 491-6422 ESL Program (503) 491-7333 ESL Program (503) 491-7675 Español INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: Varies by course. Financial aid may be available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Adult Basic Education Community Colleges English as a Second Language GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - VETERAN SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - MHCC DENTAL HYGIENE CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
